en.name: Potassium in blood
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Potassium is the principal intracellular cation; its concentration in blood is one of the most frequently ordered laboratory measurements [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by a biochemistry analyser, a blood gas analyser, or a point-of-care device. Results are reported as a substance concentration in mmol/L (SI unit) or mEq/L; the two are numerically equivalent for potassium [2]. This concept set aggregates potassium measurements across blood specimens (serum, plasma, arterial, venous, capillary, mixed venous and unspecified blood). ## Included Concepts The set is anchored on eight LOINC Hierarchy concepts (one per blood specimen, scoped to `Chemistry - non-challenge`), with their descendants pulled in. After exclusions, the set resolves to nine LOINC "Lab Test" concepts, grouped here by specimen. ### Serum or plasma (default specimen for routine biochemistry) - *3023103 / 2823-3 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma (LOINC)*: most widely used LOINC code worldwide. - *3015066 / 29349-8 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma --post dialysis (LOINC)*: point-in-time measurement immediately after a haemodialysis session. - *3039651 / 51618-7 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma --pre dialysis (LOINC)*: point-in-time measurement immediately before a haemodialysis session. ### Generic blood (specimen unspecified) - *3005456 / 6298-4 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Blood (LOINC)*: used when the source reports potassium on whole blood without further specification. - *21490733 / 75940-7 — Potassium [Mass/volume] in Blood (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration. - *46235078 / 77142-8 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum, Plasma or Blood (LOINC)*: specimen-agnostic. ### Arterial blood - *3043409 / 32713-0 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Arterial blood (LOINC)*: typically reported by a blood gas analyser. ### Venous blood - *3041354 / 39789-3 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Venous blood (LOINC)* ### Capillary blood - *3040893 / 39790-1 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Capillary blood (LOINC)*: capillary heel-prick or fingerstick (neonatal, point-of-care). ### Mixed venous blood - *3031219 / 41656-0 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Mixed venous blood (LOINC)*: typically from a Swan-Ganz catheter. **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`: **`mmol/L`** (concept 8753 — millimole per litre). Source systems may report `mmol/L` or `mEq/L`; for potassium (a monovalent cation) the two are numerically equal. **Note on haemolysis.** Potassium concentration is highly sensitive to haemolysis: red blood cells contain ~30-fold more potassium than plasma, so a haemolysed sample yields a falsely elevated result. The LOINC code does not encode whether the sample was haemolysed; this information, when available in the source, should be preserved at the measurement source value level. ## Excluded Concepts The Serum/Plasma hierarchy above pulls in two LOINC concepts that are explicitly excluded: ### Sequential specimen series — protocol-specific, out of scope for routine potassium - *3024380 / 12812-4 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma --2nd specimen* - *3024920 / 12813-2 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma --3rd specimen* The set also deliberately omits the following LOINC concepts: - **Red Blood Cells specimens** (e.g. `42528882 / 82722-0 — Potassium [Mass/volume] in Red Blood Cells`): intra-erythrocytic potassium, specialised research measurement. - **Body fluid, CSF, dialysis fluid, gastric fluid, peritoneal fluid, saliva, stool, sweat, synovial fluid, hair, amniotic fluid, vitreous fluid, water, mother's milk, hyperal solution, total parental nutrition specimens**: out of scope for a "blood" concept set. - **Urine specimens**: out of scope (captured by the separate "Urinary potassium" concept set). - **Fetus specimens**: out of scope. ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports "potassium", "K", "kalaemia" without further specification: `3023103 / 2823-3 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma`. By far the most common LOINC code. - **Source reports a potassium value from a blood gas analyser** (typically arterial): map to `3043409 / 32713-0 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Arterial blood`. - **Specimen unspecified**: map to `46235078 / 77142-8 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum, Plasma or Blood`. - **Source unit is mEq/L**: numerically equivalent to mmol/L for potassium; no conversion needed. - **Do not confuse with**: urinary potassium (separate concept set, "Urinary potassium"), intra-erythrocytic potassium, Na/K ratio. ## References [1] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 2823-3 — Potassium [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma. Available: https://loinc.org/2823-3/ [2] Nomenclature for Properties and Units (NPU). IFCC/IUPAC. NPU codes (current release). Available: https://npu-terminology.org/npu-database/
